## What
One-sentence summary.

## Why
The user-facing motivation (or "fixes #...").

## How tested
- [ ] `pnpm -r test`
- [ ] `pytest` (if Python changed)
- [ ] Manual smoke test against the live API (specify which endpoint)

## Checklist
- [ ] Added or updated tests (using captured fixtures, not hand-written JSON).
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Updated docs / README if the public surface changed.
- [ ] PR title follows [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org).
